title: calyptrogyne panamensis subsp. panamensis
intro: Calyptrogyne panamensis subsp. panamensis is a plant species belonging to the palm family, native to Panama, characterized by its distinctive palmate leaves and compact stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calyptrogyne panamensis subsp. panamensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
